name: Jam Van
overview: Jam Van is an animated series aimed at kids that follows the exploits of Anne and Lamb as they drive across the country and hang out with some of the biggest names in contemporary music - all of whom have a song to perform. Special guest stars include Boyz II Men, Sheryl Crow, Lin-Manuel Miranda, and many more!

trailers.title: Jam Van Official Trailer | New Kids Music Show | Premieres January 19
